text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: There are lots of special days in life.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Birthdays, Shichi-Go-San, wedding
anniversaries... All are worth celebrating, but...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Today is more wonderful than all of them put
together!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Today is the day I get to race Dia in a G1 race!
Today is the day we've been working toward
forever!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And entering the scene to the roar of the crowd,
voted the most popular Umamusume by the fans,
Kitasan Black!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
I don't think there's ever been an Umamusume as
beloved as her! Just look at all those huge flags
being waved around the paddock in support!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And now, making her own dazzling entrance, it's
the second-most popular Umamusume, Satono
Diamond!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
She was born into wealth and has been in the
spotlight since before her debut! Surely this
gorgeous diamond will shine on the track today!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
What dramatic twists and turns are in store for us
today as these two lifelong friends go
head-to-head?!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Twists and turns? There won't be anything like
what they're expecting, even if there are any...
We only got this far because we had each other.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Agreed. I'm just glad that we received so many
votes from the fans.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I think the number of people who voted for me
went up a little, but I only got first by a narrow
margin.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. I trailed behind you very slightly, but
that's how things always have been, haven't they?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
It's almost scary how fast you caught up to me!
Still...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I'm not going to let you surpass me, either in the
polls or the race! I'm crossing the finish line first,
Dia!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I'm not going to accept the status quo. It's time
for me to shake things up. Today's the day I
overtake you and beat you to the finish!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Let's make this festival one for the ages,
together!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Yes! At long last, our dream is about to turn into
reality!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
But that's not all! This Arima Kinen isn't just about
between these two.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Everything really had to fall into place for this
last-second entrant! Will this super Umamusume
be able to pull off another miracle?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Teio... I can't wait to race with you!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I'll admit, I was really surprised when I found out
you were running today too.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Kita, I stand here before you as your opponent
today.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
My opponent?! That can't be... I've looked up to
you for so long. You're my idol!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Come on, is that any way for a Triple Crown
champion to talk?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I want to beat you fair and square, not just with
statistics and numbers, but with my own two legs.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
So? What do you two think? Is there room for one
more in your dream race?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Yes! Of course! Today's the day I pay you back
for the dream you've given me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To Kitasan Black, this lineup has to feel like the
culmination of all her hard work.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With her idol and her eternal best friend on the
track with her, Kitasan Black's unforgettable
dream race gets underway!
